Trails.Name: Lower Wanderer, West Meadows, Mike's Way
Old Log Rd, West Meadows, Mike's Way
Sun Bowl, Home Run, 91, Main Base Area

_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
3/4 2:25PM - Couldn’t ask for a better day with the sun shining, 5 inches of fresh snow, and the Gondola back online! You heard that right, after finishing up the part installation and clearing inspections this morning, the Gondola is now back open and we couldn’t be more stoked! We’re set up for a great next couple of days with the possibility for more snow tomorrow night, so keep doing those snow dances! For your Thursday, we will be getting down all 99 open trails, with 68 set to be smoothed out overnight. Find your way up 9 lifts scheduled to spin at 9AM with no delays anticipated. We’ve got another beautiful day lined up tomorrow, so I better be seeing you bright and early!

Safety Tip: Remember to always take it easy later in the day. Take breaks and stay hydrated!

The 2026 FIS Freestyle Ski NorAm Cup is going down this Saturday and Sunday on World Cup! Spectators are welcome to hike up Old Log Road (free of charge) or ski down to the Snow Bowl lift. If hiking, snowshoes are recommended and can be rented at First Run Ski Shop in the Village. Not able to make it? Watch the event live via the Snow Bowl Webcam. Welcome and good luck to all of the competitors!

Starting March 1, jump into Stratton's Ikon Pass Spring Rewards Challenge. The more you scan, the more you win, and we're giving away tons of prizes all month long. You could score summer concert tickets with a night of lodging, a 26/27 Ikon Pass, and even more prizes! Scan your Ikon Pass at Stratton March 1-31 and start stacking the perks. Click here to learn more about the Ikon Pass Holder Spring Rewards Challenge.

We’re offering 50% off lift tickets every Wednesday and Thursday this season—excluding President’s Week. What are you waiting for? Book now!

Reliable cars are the name of the game; that is why we trust Oliver Subaru and Ford. Made for all seasons and all families, check out Oliver Ford and Oliver Subaru for year-round reliability!

Stay and relish the Green Mountains! Stratton Real Estate is here to help with all your real estate needs. Make your sweet escape a reality.
_inspectorSnowReport.Alert: 11:40 AM - The Gondola is now back open!
